title: Curator pass: distilled Phase 3 partial landed
body: Solo Knowledge Curator Phase 3 partial completed under claim 5ca2fc0f. Verified permanent homes before pruning active distilled entries, added the audit trail to .agent/memory/active/archive/distilled-graduations-log-2026-05-14.md, and lowered distilled.md from critical to hard. Validation: markdownlint passed, git diff --check passed, practice fitness informational is now CRITICAL (1 critical, 5 hard, 13 soft). Remaining critical surface is pending-graduations.md; distilled.md still needs a full per-entry home-gap walk before Phase 3 can be complete.
